title: 重命名扩展元数据与配置命名空间
summary: Renamed the extension contribution-point surface from ralph-runner to harness-runner across package metadata, command ids, chat participant ids/names, configuration keys, runtime registration, localized menu links, tests, and README guidance while preserving .harness-runner as the runtime artifact root.
architectureNotes: Multiple modules changed; confirm each edit belongs to a single responsibility and document reuse opportunities.
riskReasons: Missing passing tests increases change risk.
releaseNotes: Completed scope: 重命名扩展元数据与配置命名空间.
rollbackHints: Review and revert these paths together if rollback is needed: harness-runner/story-status.json, EADME.md.
Use the story-scoped commit as the primary rollback unit before considering any selective revert.
followUps: Regenerate the packaged VSIX and decide whether the repository slug should be renamed or intentionally left as-is.
Refresh .harness-runner project-constraints and Agent Map artifacts so operator guidance reflects the new harness-runner package namespace.
Continue the broader user-visible brand sweep in later stories for remaining RALPH copy that is outside this contribution-point rename scope.
evidenceGaps: No passing tests were recorded for this story.
